# Guelph Appliance Repair — Appliance Repair Leads, Guelph, Ontario

> Connects Guelph, Ontario homeowners with a broken washer, dryer, fridge, dishwasher, or stove with a single vetted, exclusive local appliance repair technician. Part of the WeProvideLeads network of local-service lead generation sites serving Guelph, Ontario, Canada.

This site is a lead-generation and referral service, not an appliance repair company itself. Requests submitted through the contact form are matched with one qualified, exclusive appliance repair technician serving the area. Same-day and next-day appointments available; common parts stocked on the truck so most repairs complete on the first visit. Services all major brands: Samsung, LG, Whirlpool, Maytag, Kenmore, Bosch, GE, Frigidaire, Electrolux, Miele.

## Services
- Washer Repair
- Dryer Repair
- Refrigerator Repair
- Dishwasher Repair
- Stove & Oven Repair
- Freezer & Other Appliances

## Service area
Guelph, Fergus, Elora, Rockwood, Erin, Acton, Puslinch, Cambridge, Wellington County
